title: Motion Design System from Michelin
content: # Michelin Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Adobe Alaska Airlines Amazon Apple Atlassian Audi Basis Biings Brainly Carrefour Cash App CBRE Build Cisco Datadog Dell Docplanner eBay Elastic Esri General Electric Github GitLab Google GOV.UK Gusto Helly Hansen IBM Ideagen INPS Kajabi Kiwicom Lemon Squeezy Line LocalTapiola Microsoft Monday.com MongoDB Motorway Mozilla Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Pinterest Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Red Hat Rei Salesforce Samsung Seek Segment ServiceNow Shopify Skoda Sprout Social SumUp Sunrise Teamleader Thumbtack Twilio U.S. Web UAE Uber Vercel Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Wise Wonderflow Workday WorkOS Zendesk Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Motion from Directories: Components: Motion is a Michelin Design System, developed as an extension of the Brand Center to streamline digital product creation. It offers a set of ready-to-use components, tools, and guidelines, ensuring consistency and efficiency across platforms. Already used in over 200 products, the system is continuously evolving with contributions from a broad community of designers and developers. Its modular approach ensures flexibility, while accessibility and user experience remain key priorities. Motion Design System is designed to adapt, grow, and improve, making it a valuable resource for teams building digital experiences within Michelin and beyond.
